# Architecture

<!-- Generated by /ai-context. Manual edits are overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### Style

Code-behind WPF application — UI logic lives directly in `MainWindow.xaml.cs` event handlers; no MVVM, no ViewModel layer, no dependency injection container.

### Directory layout

```
CertGuardMini/
├── CertGuardMini.sln              # Visual Studio solution file
├── CertGuardMini.csproj           # .NET 8 WPF project, single NuGet dependency
├── App.xaml / App.xaml.cs         # WPF application root, global Button style
├── MainWindow.xaml                # UI layout: proxy controls, log, domain rules panel
├── MainWindow.xaml.cs             # Code-behind: event handlers, proxy orchestration
├── Models/
│   └── CertificateInfo.cs         # CertificateInfo + DomainRule DTOs
├── Services/
│   ├── CertBrokerService.cs       # Certificate lifecycle + domain rule management
│   └── ProxyService.cs            # Titanium.Web.Proxy MITM intercept + block page
├── Views/                         # Empty — not yet populated
├── Converters/                    # Empty — not yet populated
├── TestCerts/
│   └── test.pfx                   # Test certificate file
├── docs/                          # Architecture, API, domain-blocking, audit specs
├── .github/workflows/build.yml    # CI: manual-trigger Windows build + publish
└── scripts/
    └── ralph.sh                   # Phase-based implementation orchestrator
```

### Layer responsibilities

| Layer | Owns | Does NOT own |
|-------|------|--------------|
| **UI** (`MainWindow.xaml(.cs)`) | Button click handlers, log display, status bar updates, PFX file dialog | Domain rule logic, proxy lifecycle internals, certificate cryptography |
| **Services** (`CertBrokerService`, `ProxyService`) | Certificate loading/unloading, domain allow/block checks, HTTPS interception, block page HTML generation, system proxy registration | UI rendering, persistence, network configuration beyond port 8888 |
| **Models** (`CertificateInfo`, `DomainRule`) | DTO shape definitions, property defaults | Business logic, validation, persistence |

### External integration points

| System | Client / config | Notes |
|--------|-----------------|-------|
| Titanium.Web.Proxy 3.2.0 | `ProxyServer` instance, `ExplicitProxyEndPoint` on port 8888 | MITM proxy; `CertificateManager.EnsureRootCertificate()` installs a root CA; `SetAsSystemProxy` configures Windows system proxy |
| Windows OS | `System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2` | PFX loaded with `EphemeralKeySet` flag — private key stays in memory only |
| Windows file system | `OpenFileDialog` in `MainWindow.xaml.cs` | User selects `.pfx` / `.p12` file manually |
